jwtDisabledAllowlist.generate-audit-report: Validates either a signed-in user with buyer access or SYSTEM_INVOCATION_SECRET.
jwtDisabledAllowlist.document-link-handler: Validates a scoped document access token and validates user JWTs for authenticated operations.
jwtDisabledAllowlist.send-ticket-notification: Validates the caller JWT inside the function.
